output:
[Unit]
Description=Hermes Agent Gateway - Messaging Platform Integration
After=network-online.target
Wants=network-online.target
StartLimitIntervalSec=0

[Service]
Type=simple
User=jose
Group=jose
ExecStart=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python -m hermes_cli.main gateway run --replace
WorkingDirectory=/home/jose/.hermes
Environment="HOME=/home/jose"
Environment="USER=jose"
Environment="LOGNAME=jose"
Environment="PATH=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv/bin:/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/node_modules/.bin:/home/jose/.local/bin:/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"
Environment="VIRTUAL_ENV=/home/jose/.hermes/hermes-agent/venv"
Environment="HERMES_HOME=/home/jose/.hermes"
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
RestartMaxDelaySec=300
RestartSteps=5
RestartForceExitStatus=75
KillMode=mixed
KillSignal=SIGTERM
ExecReload=/bin/kill -USR1 $MAINPID
TimeoutStopSec=210
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
===
no_gateway_env
TERMINAL_MODAL_IMAGE=nikolaik/python-nodejs:python3.11-nodejs20
TERMINAL_TIMEOUT=60
TERMINAL_LIFETIME_SECONDS=300
BROWSERBASE_PROXIES=true
BROWSERBASE_ADVANCED_STEALTH=false
BROWSER_SESSION_TIMEOUT=300
BROWSER_INACTIVITY_TIMEOUT=120
WEB_TOOLS_DEBUG=false
VISION_TOOLS_DEBUG=false
MOA_TOOLS_DEBUG=false
IMAGE_TOOLS_DEBUG=false
TERMINAL_ENV=local
OLLAMA_BASE_URL=http://192.168.0.203:11434/v1
OLLAMA_API_KEY=ollama
HERMES_MODEL=ollama/llama3.1:8b
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=8849049212:AAG4BfaeqinpzPxN-EKmtsMTFZeUc01nua0
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS=8869156588
